title: Purple Glowing Ancient Debris
description: Replaces ancient debris textures with custom purple glowing versions, making them easier to spot while mining in the nether or under lava. Compatible with Java Edition 1.21.11.
body: ![lavatest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4140181172530d6f3f5d437d595a57e4197d7b93.png)Purple Glowing Ancient Debris replaces the default ancient debris textures with custom purple glowing versions, making them much easier to spot while strip mining in the nether or searching under lava. No bloat, just a clean texture swap. Compatible with Java Edition 1.21.11.
